scripts.electron:dev: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.electron:build: cross-env BUILD_TARGET=electron next build --webpack && node scripts/prepare-electron.js
scripts.electron:build:win: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist-electron',{recursive:true,force:true})" && npm run electron:build && electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.electron:build:mac: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist-electron',{recursive:true,force:true})" && npm run electron:build && electron-builder --mac --publish never
